---
title: "Slides"
---

Replace the placeholder files with your final slide decks.

| Day | Topic | File |
|---|---|---|
| June 25 | Decision trees and Markov models | `slides/day1/day1-slides.pdf` |
| June 26 | Microsimulation modeling | `slides/day2/day2-slides.pdf` |
| June 27 | Sensitivity analysis | `slides/day3/day3-slides.pdf` |
